scripts.build: bun build --compile --minify kern.ts --outfile dist/kern --define __VERSION__='"dev"' && cp -r node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/dist/modes/interactive/theme dist/theme && cp -r node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/dist/modes/interactive/assets dist/assets && cp -r node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/dist/core/export-html dist/export-html && node -e "const p=require('./package.json');delete p.scripts;require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2))"
